title: MTR Unidirectional Platform
description: Unidirectional platform retextures to avoid manually rotating in worldedit
body:
- This changes the NA Platform Block to have the Yellow Concrete texture to avoid looking weird if flipped using WorldEdit

![The ReTexture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc6abb17618228730a238602a11a580143fb40c0.png)
